description: Local Vision-to-Script-to-Cut pipeline for processing raw OBS prototyping footage.

userStories.title: Project Scaffolding
userStories.description: As the automation loop, I need a working Python project structure so all subsequent stories can install and import dependencies.
acceptanceCriteria: Create project directory structure: src/autovideo/ (package), assets/, output/, tests/
Generate requirements.txt with ffmpeg-python, moviepy, mlx, mlx-vlm, numpy, Pillow, tqdm, pyyaml, pytest
Create pyproject.toml with project metadata and dev dependencies (mypy, pytest, ruff)
Create a .venv/ virtualenv and verify pip install -r requirements.txt succeeds
Typecheck and lint passes.

userStories.title: Configuration Module
userStories.description: As the automation loop, I need a unified configuration system so all pipeline stages share consistent parameters.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/autovideo/config.py with a dataclass or Pydantic model holding: frame_interval (2–5s), model paths, input/output dirs, VLM/LLM model names, temp dir
Support loading config from YAML/JSON file with sensible defaults
Support CLI overrides via argparse (--video, --config, --output-dir)
Typecheck and lint passes.

userStories.title: Logging Infrastructure
userStories.description: As the automation loop, I need structured logging so pipeline failures are diagnosable across long-running jobs.
acceptanceCriteria: Configure Python logging with file and console handlers in src/autovideo/logging_setup.py
Log timestamps, module name, log level, and message
Each pipeline module (extract, analyze, generate, assemble) logs its start, progress, and completion
Typecheck and lint passes.

userStories.title: Frame Extraction Module
userStories.description: As the automation loop, I need to extract frames from OBS output so the vision model can analyze them.
acceptanceCriteria: Use ffmpeg to extract 1 frame every 2 to 5 seconds from the target video file, configurable via config module
Save extracted frames temporarily to a structured local directory (frames/<timestamp>.jpg)
Log extraction progress (frame count, elapsed time)
Typecheck and lint passes.

userStories.title: Local Vision Analysis
userStories.description: As the automation loop, I need to pass frames to a local VLM to generate a chronological event log.
acceptanceCriteria: Load local VLM (e.g., Qwen-VL or LLaVA) using MLX to optimize for unified memory.
Analyze each frame to generate a timestamped JSON log describing the physical action.
Ensure memory is cleared between batches to maintain stability within system limits.
userStories.notes: Implemented VLM-based frame analysis using mlx_vlm. Batch processing with memory cleanup. Error-tolerant per-frame processing. 9 new tests.

userStories.title: Script and Cut-List Generation
userStories.description: As a creator, I want the LLM to identify narrative arcs and generate a cut-list from the vision logs.
acceptanceCriteria: Pass the vision JSON log and project reference documents to the local Qwen3 model.
Model outputs a JSON object containing 'keep' timestamp ranges and a drafted voiceover script.
Logic explicitly filters out 'dead time' (e.g., staring, no active prototyping).
userStories.notes: Implemented cut-list generation with LLM (Qwen3 via mlx_lm) and deterministic fallback. Loads vision_log.json, filters inactive frames, groups into keep ranges, generates voiceover script. 17 tests.

userStories.title: Automated Assembly
userStories.description: As a creator, I want the system to automatically slice the original OBS file using the generated cut-list.
acceptanceCriteria: Parse the 'keep' timestamps using MoviePy.
Concatenate the subclips into a single master output file.
Clean up temporary extracted frames and temporary files after a successful render.

userStories.title: Audio Extraction and Processing
userStories.description: As a creator, I need the pipeline to extract and preserve the audio track from OBS footage for use in the final output.
acceptanceCriteria: Extract audio track from the source OBS video using ffmpeg
Integrate audio into the MoviePy assembly so final output has synchronized audio
Support optional voiceover overlay (from US-005 script) mixed with original audio
Typecheck and lint passes.

userStories.title: Output Validation and Verification
userStories.description: As a creator, I want automated checks that the final rendered video is complete and correct before considering the pipeline finished.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify output_master.mp4 exists and has non-zero duration
Assert the number of concatenated segments matches the cut_list.json keep ranges
Log output file size, duration, and codec info for human audit
Typecheck and lint passes.

userStories.title: Testing Setup and Smoke Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a test harness and smoke tests to catch regressions across the pipeline.
acceptanceCriteria: Create pytest configuration in pyproject.toml (or pytest.ini)
Add a smoke test fixture: a 10-second synthetic test video generated by ffmpeg
Write an integration test that runs the full pipeline on the synthetic video and asserts output_master.mp4 is produced
Write unit tests for Config loading, frame extraction timestamps, and cut_list JSON parsing
Typecheck and lint passes.

userStories.title: Error Recovery and Retry Logic
userStories.description: As the automation loop, I need the pipeline to handle partial failures gracefully so long runs are not lost.
acceptanceCriteria: Wrap VLM and LLM inference calls with retry logic (exponential backoff, max 3 retries)
On ffmpeg failure, log the error and skip the corrupted segment rather than aborting the entire run
Support resuming from the last successful stage by checking for existing intermediate artifacts
Typecheck and lint passes.
